title: Update Proposal Batch
description: A batched proposal bundle grouping multiple candidate changes for a single human review pass. Each item in the bundle is a full Memory, State, or session-note update proposal as defined in memory-state-update-proposal.schema.json. Creating a bundle does not authorize or apply any update; every item still requires explicit proposal-specific approval before apply_update may be called.

bundle_id.description: Unique identifier for this proposal bundle.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this bundle was created by propose_update_from_selection.

session_ref.description: Logical session identifier or session-note artifact path that sourced this bundle.

source_paths.description: The logical artifact paths passed to propose_update_from_selection that produced this bundle.

rationale.description: Concise explanation of why these artifacts were selected together for one review pass.

review_required.description: Always true. A bundle does not grant approval for any of its proposals.

requires_explicit_approval.description: Always true. Each proposal in the bundle requires its own proposal-specific explicit approval before apply_update may be called.

proposals.description: One or more update proposals, each conforming to memory-state-update-proposal.schema.json. All must have approval_status: pending_review at bundle creation time.
